title: m1kareal hugosmp
description: Simple Texturepack to make it harder for Base finders to find you.
body:
# Features
- No Block Rotation
- Deepslate to Stone
- "UHC" Ores
- Bedrock to Stone
- Tuff to Stone (Sehr Tuff)

## About HugoSMP
- HugoSMP is a vanilla like SMP server, made by the German Streamer and Youtuber LetsHugo
- The IP is hugosmp.net
